_comment: Project-local Claude Code settings for mrcall-desktop. Hooks are notification-only and never block tool use. See .claude/README.md.

hooks.command: bash -c 'SCRIPT=".claude/scripts/hooks/warning-messages.sh"; if [[ -x "$SCRIPT" ]]; then "$SCRIPT" tdd-reminder "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null || true; fi; exit 0'

bash -c 'if [[ "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" == *"git push"* ]]; then SCRIPT=".claude/scripts/hooks/warning-messages.sh"; if [[ -x "$SCRIPT" ]]; then "$SCRIPT" push-quality 2>/dev/null || true; fi; fi; exit 0'
bash -c 'SCRIPT=".claude/scripts/hooks/warning-messages.sh"; if [[ -x "$SCRIPT" ]]; then "$SCRIPT" file-written "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null || true; fi; exit 0'

bash -c 'if echo "$CLAUDE_USER_PROMPT" | grep -qiE "release|notarize|publish|deploy|production"; then SCRIPT=".claude/scripts/hooks/warning-messages.sh"; if [[ -x "$SCRIPT" ]]; then "$SCRIPT" release-gate 2>/dev/null || true; fi; fi; exit 0'
